NOT_FOUND: The requested item could not be found.
VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check your input and try again.
VAULT_LOCKED: Your vault is currently locked. Please log in.
NETWORK_FAILED: Failed to connect to the server. Check your connection.
SSH_CONNECTION_FAILED: Could not establish an SSH connection to the host.
SSH_SESSION_NOT_FOUND: The SSH session was disconnected or lost.
User.NotFound: User not found on this server.
User.InvalidCredentials: Login key is invalid or corrupted.
Sync.EncryptedBlob.InvalidTimestamp: The sync timestamp provided is invalid.

Auth.KeySalt.InvalidFormat: Key salt must be a valid Base64 string.
Auth.LoginKey.InvalidFormat: Login key must be a valid Base64 string.
Auth.MasterKey.InvalidFormat: Encrypted master key must be a valid Base64 string.
Sync.EncryptedBlob.Id.Required: Item ID is required for sync.
Sync.EncryptedBlob.Blob.Required: Encrypted data is required for sync.
Sync.EncryptedBlob.Blob.InvalidFormat: Encrypted data must be a valid Base64 string.
